## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Riverside.FM and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content marketing and SEO initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Riverside.FM is seeking to accelerate growth and improve operational efficiency in their content marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation workflows and strategic guidance, positioning themselves as an extension of the client's team](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach emphasizes high-quality, persona-driven content creation at scale, not just typical "SEO content"](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Engagement typically starts with a 2-month strategy sprint ($20K) before moving to a 12-month engagement ($9K-$15K+ monthly)](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)

## Topics

### Riverside.FM Background and Challenges

  - [275-person company offering an end-to-end creation platform for audiovisual content](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Hybrid go-to-market approach (self-serve and sales-assisted)](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Rapidly evolving product and market positioning](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Seeking to accelerate growth and improve efficiency in existing content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Interested in leveraging unique data (support, sales calls) for bottom-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Positions as "software as a service" with AI-driven workflows for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor-in-chief and experienced growth/SEO professionals](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Emphasis on helping clients "think like publishers" with high-quality, strategic content](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Uses modular AI workflows for research, briefing, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Provides end-to-end service from strategy to execution, including technical SEO and conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Tools

  - [Uses Slack and Notion for collaboration and updates](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Develops a "Content OS" in Airtable as a source of truth for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Starts engagements with a strategy sprint to deeply understand personas and develop a 6-month roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
  - [Focuses on creating "A-plus content" that goes beyond typical SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Engagement Structure and Pricing

  - [2-month strategy sprint ($20K) to align on strategy and de-risk the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
  - [12-month engagements ranging from $9K to $15K+ per month](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)
  - [Content volume varies from 5-15 articles per week, with potential for hundreds of pages monthly with programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up with additional information, including:](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
      - [More details on engagement structure](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
      - [Examples of editorial content pieces and reference companies](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
      - [Slack invitation for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Schedule a potential follow-up call for next week if Abel wants to explore further](https://fathom.video/share/68Yt-4yPL-LKFkod-yM3MHQ21-r-n4pU?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)
